command.coins.drop.dropping: Dropping {amount} coins in a radius of {radius} around {target}.
command.coins.drop.usage: Drop coins around a player or location. An amount, radius, and the value of each coin can be specified.
command.coins.reload.perform: Config of <coins>Coins</coins> has been reloaded in {duration}ms.
command.coins.reload.settings: Use <var>/coins settings</var> to see all active settings.
command.coins.reload.warnings: <error>Reload complete with {amount} warnings. See console for details.
command.coins.remove.removed: Removed a total of {amount} coins in the world.
command.coins.toggle.disabled: When disabled, coins won't drop and withdrawing isn't possible. Picking up existing coins and depositing them will still work.
command.coins.toggle.toggled: Coins has been globally {type}. Toggle with <var>/coins toggle</var>.
command.coins.version.new_release: Latest version of <coins>Coins</coins> is {version}, released on {date}, and described as: '{description}'. Consider updating the plugin to this version.
command.disabled_reasons: Plugin <coins>Coins</coins> is disabled for the following reason(s):
command.invalid_location: <error>Cannot find a location from given input.
command.invalid_number: <error>Given input for '{type}' is an invalid number.
command.invalid_player: <error>Cannot find an online player from given input.
command.invalid_range: <error>Given input for '{type}' must be between {min} and {max}.
command.no_permission: <error>You do not have access to that command.
command.withdraw.disabled: <error>Withdrawing coins is disabled on this server.
command.withdraw.full_inventory: <error>Unable to withdraw coins because your inventory is full.
command.withdraw.usage: Withdraw money from your balance into physical coins.
command.withdraw.withdrew: Withdrew {currency}{amount} from balance as a physical coin.
